actions.text: Eliza toured 04/22, decision expected ~04/30 (TOMORROW). Check-in iMessage sent 04/29 morning. Strong fit: UNC grad, works downtown Oakland, Aug 1. If no response by midday 04/30, consider a gentle close.

prospects.name: Julian Flanagan
prospects.notes: Berkeley Biophysics PhD student, age 21. Zillow application approved 04/12. Lease signed. Term: Aug 1 2026–Jul 31 2027, $1,650/mo, $1,650 deposit. Room A (King) filled. **04/17: Venmo payment received — $3,300 (1st month + deposit). Fully committed.**

prospects.name: Isabella
prospects.notes: Incoming UC Berkeley Civil & Environmental Engineering masters student, Aug move-in, lives ~1hr from Berkeley. Very friendly, polite, clean, responsible. Willing to meet housemates. **04/27 8:19 PM:** Isabella messaged intro. **04/27 ~9:53 PM:** Mike replied with room details ($1,650/mo, Aug 1, 400sqft, introduced Julian as housemate), offered Wed 4/29 PM or Sat 5/2 PM tour. **04/27 ~9:55 PM:** Isabella replied — interested in photos + tour, already visiting another property Sat but available after 1 PM. **04/27 ~9:56 PM:** Mike replied he'd be out of town but Fabio (handyman) can show her around. **04/28 ~3:34 AM:** Mike sent Fabio's photo + "He's my handy man." **04/28 ~3:23 AM:** Isabella replied "Ok! That will still work for me" — **TOUR CONFIRMED: Sat 5/2 after 1 PM with Fabio.** Strong fit — grad student, Aug 1, collaborative housemate. **04/28 2:36 PM PT:** Isabella messaged "Thank you! I will add his contact information" (re: Fabio's photo) — Tour logistics **FULLY SET** ✅

prospects.name: Eliza
prospects.notes: 23yo, UNC Chapel Hill grad, works downtown Oakland. Has a car — parking and safe neighborhood important. Messaged 7:22 AM PT. Morning sweep replied with room details. **04/21 midday:** Eliza replied "Yes please, that all sounds amazing!" Midday sweep scheduled tour Wed 4/22 4:30 PM. **04/21 afternoon (12:55 PM PT):** Eliza confirmed. Tour fully confirmed. **04/22 morning:** Mike shared contractor's phone number. **04/22 4:30 PM:** Tour conducted by contractor. **04/22 evening:** Post-tour follow-up sent. **04/23 ~1:15 AM:** Eliza replied — asked about Airbnb arrangement (current tenant mentioned it). Mike explained: he Airbnbs his downstairs room 3 days/week when in Oakland for work, 13 years, no problems. **04/23 ~1:50 AM:** Eliza replied "Ahh ok, if it's agreeable for you, I'll take a week or so to think on it thank you!" **04/23 ~2:08 AM:** Mike replied "Of course. Only rent if it feels right." Thread warm. Decision expected ~04/30 (tomorrow). Strong fit — professional, local. Aug 1 timeline TBD. **04/29 8 AM sweep:** Gentle check-in iMessage sent. Awaiting reply.

prospects.name: Liam
prospects.notes: PA at Highland Hospital Oakland (10 yrs), cyclist/reader/writer. Has 5yo Australian Shepherd "Kota." Phone: 951-213-1749. Tour attempted 04/16 noon but Liam was tied up. **04/16:** Liam "will swing by next week." **04/18:** Active iMessage convo with Mike. Mike confirmed pet policy: allowed if house-trained + well-behaved, $250 deposit for deep clean. Liam confirmed "That's perfect thanks." **04/18 (2:21 PM PT):** Mike asked move-in date. Liam replied "May 15ish, flexible." Mike clarified: soonest current tenant moves out is beginning of July. **04/19:** Liam "Ok I might be able to make that work." Thread warm. 🐾 Pet: Australian Shepherd — $250 deposit confirmed. **04/22:** Thu 4/23 Fast Track Swing conflict. Morning sweep drafted reschedule. Liam confirmed can't make Thu, Mike asked about 4/23 but Liam said "won't be in city until the evening." Mike offered contractor/handyman to show him the place instead. **04/27 ~11:35 AM PT:** Sent warm close: "Hey Liam totally understand things have been hectic. The room's still here if the timing ever lines up for you. Feel free to reach back out anytime." **04/27 ~11:49 AM PT:** Liam replied — "Hey Mike, apologies for not getting back to you sooner. A few things fell through with a job I was hoping to get so I'm currently delayed in my plans. I'll get back to you soon. LK" **04/27 ~12:12 PM PT:** Mike replied warmly — "No worries at all, Liam sorry to hear about the job situation. The room's available August 1 so there's still time on your side. Whenever your plans firm back up, just reach out and we'll get you in to see it. Hope things look up soon!" **04/27 ~12:45 PM PT:** Liam replied "Thanks for the heads up." — Thread fully resolved for now. Self-pacing, will reach back out when ready. No action needed. Move-in target: July/Aug 1 (Mike to decide if July OK).

scheduled.notes: UC Berkeley CEE Masters student, Aug move-in. Tour with Fabio (handyman). Confirmed 04/28 AM via iMessage. Isabella said "Ok! That will still work for me." Mike sent Fabio's contact/photo.

completed.outcome: RESCHEDULING — Tour did NOT happen at 11am. Julian messaged ready at 10:16 AM PT; Mike replied 11:27 AM PT asking Julian to text 714-612-0723 to do FaceTime/Zoom later today. Julian saw message. Pending reschedule for later today 04/12.
CANCELLED — Mike's flight delayed. Rescheduling attempted via iMessage but stalled since 04/10. Julius available mornings before work, in town through Wed. Mike: nudge to reschedule.

archived.name: Jacquy
archived.notes: Messaged 07:25 AM. Morning sweep replied 08:17 with room details. 5 days no reply. Archived 04/22 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

archived.name: Taranjot
archived.notes: Messaged 07:06 AM. Morning sweep replied 08:17. Taranjot replied "Hey yes! Can we schedule a tour." Midday: sent screening questions + tour offer. **04/17 evening (12:50 PM):** Taranjot replied "Oh dang I'm trying to move in a week or two 😟" — DISQUALIFIED: immediate move-in vs. Aug 1 lease. Evening sweep sent polite decline. Closed.

archived.name: Niokhor Dione
archived.notes: New Zillow lead. Replied 04/12, then 5 days silence. Archived 04/17. **04/18 evening:** Niokhor replied via Zillow: "Hi Mike, unfortunately I'm looking for something immediately and would not be able to commit for a year." — SELF-DISQUALIFIED: immediate move-in + no year commitment. Evening sweep sent gracious close. Closed.

archived.name: J T
archived.notes: UC Berkeley graduate student. Replied 04/12. 6 days no response. Archived 04/18 morning sweep. STRONG fit — worth re-engaging via SpareRoom if Mike logs in.

archived.name: Diego Aranda
archived.notes: Replied 04/12. 6 days no response. Archived 04/18 morning sweep.

archived.name: Kris
archived.notes: Couple (ages 20, 18). Replied 04/12. 6 days no response. Archived 04/18 morning sweep. Couple may not fit single-room format regardless.

archived.name: Thomas Thuillier
archived.notes: Senior scientist at Lawrence Berkeley Lab (staff scientist). French, age 55. Seeking shared house for 1 year (wife joins Aug 2027). REPLIED 04/06 12:36 AM via Yahoo Mail to CL relay. No response after 6 days. Phone: 510-365-5300. Archived by evening sweep 04/12 per >5-day stale rule. EXCELLENT fit if re-engages — Mike can nudge via direct text.
archived.actionNeeded: Reply with screening confirmation and tour scheduling. Thomas is an excellent prospect — LBL staff scientist = very stable income, quiet/respectful, seeking 1-year lease. Suggest Friday evening tour if Mike is back in Berkeley.

archived.name: Jan Schütte-Engel
archived.notes: Postdoc at UC Berkeley. REPLIED 04/08 clarifying room details. 5+ days no reply — archived 04/13 morning sweep. Phone: 217-904-8944. Worth a direct text nudge if Mike wants to re-engage.

archived.name: Julius
archived.notes: Berkeley PhD student. Shared bathroom dealbreaker — replied 04/15 that bathroom is shared, Julius went silent (2+ days). Archived 04/17 morning sweep. Phone: 510-859-5718.

archived.name: Mohamed
archived.notes: Asked "Hi, is this available?" Mike replied "Yes, are you interested?" (Mon 14:41). No response 5 days. Archived 04/19 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

archived.name: Neel Mokaria
archived.notes: UMD student coming to SF for work June 1-Aug 15. Wants to share room with girlfriend. DISQUALIFIED: short-term (2.5 months vs 12-month lease), two occupants, wrong dates (not Aug 1). Polite decline sent 04/15. Neel replied 04/15 04:13 "I worries thanks" (acknowledging decline). Closed.

archived.name: Prakhar

archived.name: Jack Boyd
archived.notes: Incoming Berkeley grad student. Currently back east. Mike proposed Sunday 04/12 virtual tour on 04/06 — 9 days with no confirmed reply (iMessage blocked). Archived per >7-day stale rule. Phone: 805-453-2989. Worth a direct text if Mike wants to re-engage.

archived.name: Jolly
archived.notes: FB Marketplace inquiry. Mike replied "Yes." 6 days no reply. No screening info collected. Archived 04/16 morning sweep per stale rule.

archived.name: Kristine (Kristin)
archived.notes: FB Marketplace inquiry. Mike replied "Yes, are you interested?" 7+ days no reply. "You can now rate each other" auto-msg. Dead lead. Archived 04/16 morning sweep.

archived.name: Yonathan Arteaga
archived.notes: Asked "Hello, is this still available?" Replied 04/15 midday with lease terms ($1,650/mo, 12-month lease Aug 1), screening questions, tour offer. 5 days no reply. Archived 04/20 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

archived.name: 湘宜
archived.notes: Previous response sent with tour offer. Replied "Sorry I'm looking to start in mid June." DISQUALIFIED: June start doesn't match Aug 1 lease. Polite decline sent 04/15 midday.

archived.name: Morgan
archived.notes: Asked "when is the move in date and what are the other roommates like." Follow-up sent 04/15 with full details + screening questions. 5 days no reply. Archived 04/20 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

archived.name: Martin Kim
archived.notes: NEW 04/16. 21yo medical assistant working full-time 8-5 in Walnut Creek/Vallejo. Quiet, looking for a place to sleep. Replied 04/16–17 with details. Asked about May move-in. **04/17 midday:** Told Aug 1 is fixed. **04/17 evening (3:25 PM EDT):** Martin replied "I see, it probably isn't a good fit for me. Thank you nonetheless and I wish you the best of luck with your search. —Martin" — Self-declined. Evening sweep sent gracious close. Closed.

archived.name: Unknown (Zillow)
archived.notes: New Zillow lead. 2/2 screening match. Monthly income $8,333, credit 720-799, no cats/dogs (has "Other" pet), 1 occupant, 1 bedroom, parking needed, 12-month lease desired. ⚠️ Ideal move-in 06/01/2026 (doesn't match Aug 1). Application invite sent 04/15. **04/17 evening sweep (6:07 PM):** Sent clarification — Aug 1 is fixed, can't accommodate June 1, offered to move forward if Aug 1 works. **04/25 midday sweep:** 8 days no response. Archived per 5-day stale rule.

archived.name: Krishna
archived.notes: Added by morning sweep 04/19. Said she'd wait until Sunday (Mike back in town). Morning sweep sent follow-up 08:20 AM: "Hi Krishna! Just wanted to follow up — I'm back in town now. Would you still like to come see the room? Happy to set up a time this week. Feel free to text me at (714) 612-0723 for faster coordination!" No reply after 5 days — archived 04/24 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

archived.name: Arman John
archived.notes: Inquired Apr 9. Mike replied "No sorry. Only 12 month leases." Self-disqualified/declined — wanted non-12-month. Added to tracker 04/21 morning sweep.

archived.name: Yashitha
archived.notes: Asked about May 1 move-in. Told Aug 1 is earliest. **04/20 (6:29 PM):** Replied "Sure thanks but my move in is may. So this won't work but thanks for checking in." Self-disqualified: May move-in vs. Aug 1 lease. Closing reply sent; she liked it 7:18 PM. Thread fully resolved.

archived.name: Kevin
archived.notes: NEW 04/16 11:46 AM PT. Tech worker relocating to Bay Area, hybrid schedule, active lifestyle, clean/respectful. Wants move-in May 11–15. DISQUALIFIED: May timing doesn't match Aug 1 lease start. Polite decline sent 04/16 12:09 PT via FB Messenger (offered re-engagement if Aug 1 works). Closed.
